final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-view illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be an exploded/disassembled layout with all parts spread out and clearly separated
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all its individual components with labeled part names
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include labeled part names for each component (in Spanish, as per query language)
Constraints: must preserve accurate representation of all Sony A7 parts with connecting lines or indicators linking each label to its corresponding piece
Avoid:
